technologies.name: Blockchain
technologies.description: Distributed ledger and consensus mechanisms for tamper-evident storage, provenance, and integrity of DT events and configurations.

technologies.name: Secure ML / AI
technologies.description: Federated learning, differential privacy, and secure aggregation to protect models and training data in DT analytics pipelines.

technologies.name: Cryptography
technologies.description: Encryption, signatures, and secure channels to protect data at rest and in transit between physical entities, edge, and digital space.

technologies.name: Lightweight Authentication Protocols
technologies.description: Efficient mutual authentication and key agreement suited to resource-constrained IoT and industrial devices in the physical layer.

technologies.name: Access Control (RBAC, ABAC, ABE)
technologies.description: Role-, attribute-, or encryption-based access control to limit who can read, write, or synchronize DT data and VRs.

technologies.name: Software / Hardware Security (TPM, TEE)
technologies.description: Trusted execution, secure boot, and hardware roots of trust to protect firmware, keys, and critical DT software stacks.

technologies.name: Intrusion & Abnormal Detection
technologies.description: Monitoring and anomaly detection to spot DoS, poisoning, tampering, and misuse across DT communication and compute paths.

technologies.name: Incentive Mechanisms
technologies.description: Economic or reputation-based incentives to encourage honest participation and resource contribution in collaborative DT ecosystems.
